protocol_name: Broken Link Handling — Agent Escalation Rules
description: Decision rules for broken link repair vs escalation. Agent reads this after linter reports broken links.

auto_fix_rules.action: AUTO-REPAIR: rewrite link path to canonical form
auto_fix_rules.note: Always auto-fix — no user confirmation needed. Perfect match after normalization.
Auto-fix — safe rename when basename is substring/superset of target.

auto_fix_rules.action: AUTO-REPAIR: resolve relative path in same directory
auto_fix_rules.note: Auto-fix — high confidence when already in correct category folder.

escalation_rules.description: Ambiguous match — multiple candidates with similar names, cross-category confusion
escalation_rules.action: ESCALATE_TO_USER: present candidate list + request decision
escalation_rules.format: Present exactly 3-5 best matches from fuzzy scan. Quote score range.
escalation_rules.constraint: NEVER auto-fix ambiguous links — risk of wrong category (entity↔concept)

escalation_rules.description: Zero or very low match (<80) against entire wiki index
escalation_rules.action: ESCALATE_TO_USER: report missing page + suggest creation path
escalation_rules.format: {file}:{line} → target '{target}' not found in wiki. Recommend: create {category}/{canonical-name}.md

escalation_rules.description: Link to raw/ directory that no longer exists
escalation_rules.action: ESCALATE_TO_USER (unless source still available on disk)
escalation_rules.constraint: Never auto-fix raw links — they point to external sources, not wiki pages

escalation_template.format:
[!broken-link] {{file}}:{{line}} → {{link_target}} (fuzzy: {{score}}, candidates: [{path1}, {path2}])
User decision needed — options:
  - Confirm best match for auto-repair
  - Create new wiki page at suggested path
  - Skip and log as dead_end
escalation_template.note: Message to user MUST NOT stop process. Agent continues with normal workflow while waiting.

post_escalation_actions.description: Log unresolved broken links in working_memory.json.broken_links_resolved[] for tracking

post_escalation_actions.constraint: NEVER wait for user response to continue — escalate asynchronously, proceed with query/ingest/lint

integration_points.role: Linter calls link-validator.sh --auto → filters auto-fixed vs agent_review_required
broken_link_awareness reads WM cache, but must NOT scan wiki — use linter output from working_memory
